nasb.text: If an alien sojourns with you, or one who may be among you throughout your generations, and he wishes to make an offering by fire, as a soothing aroma to the Lord, just as you do so he shall do.

esv.text: And if a stranger is sojourning with you, or anyone is living permanently among you, and he wishes to offer a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the Lord, he shall do as you do.

cnv.text: 如果有外人與你們同住，或有人世世代代住在你們中間的，要獻馨香的火祭給耶和華；你們怎樣辦理，他也要怎樣辦理。

ccb.text: 住在你们中间的外族人，不管是暂住还是世代居住的，若愿意献上蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香火祭，也要这样办理。
